text:
Once upon a sunny morning, little owl Winnie loved flying upside-down. Her favourite thing was seeking out the sweet smell of wild things. She'd glide up to curious birds and chat about berries.

One day, she flew too low over a muddy puddle and slithered. Poohbear, her favorite bear friend, found her.

"Poor thing," Poohbear said. "Why didn't you try hanging onto my buttons?"

Winnie hiccupped. Hiccoughs sounded like laughs.

"I think I ducked too much!" she said.

They chased frogs together afterwards. Later, Poohbear told her about his rabbit friends.

"Afternoon tea!" he chuckled.

She imagined little cottages. They had tea parties. The rabbits always baked cookies.

Winnie had dreams.

One moonlit night, she dreamed she built her own cake shop.

She decorated old boots. They became old allies. They sold shoes together.

She woke up. Tomorrow was cherry pie day.
